---
title: "gglite in Quarto"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
library(gglite)
```

## Scatter plot

```{r}
#| label: scatter
g2(mtcars, x = 'mpg', y = 'hp') |> mark_point()
```

## Bar chart

```{r}
#| label: bar
g2(mtcars, x = 'cyl') |> mark_interval()
```

## Line chart (time series)

```{r}
#| label: line
g2(sunspot.year)
```
